nasb.text: The Israelites, all the men and women, whose heart moved them to bring material for all the work, which the Lord had commanded through Moses to be done, brought a freewill offering to the Lord.

esv.text: All the men and women, the people of Israel, whose heart moved them to bring anything for the work that the Lord had commanded by Moses to be done brought it as a freewill offering to the Lord.

cnv.text: 以色列人無論男女，凡是甘心樂意為作耶和華藉摩西吩咐的一切工程的，都把自願奉獻的禮物帶了來獻給耶和華。

ccb.text: 以色列人，不论男女、凡是甘心乐意奉献的，都把礼物带来献给耶和华，好完成耶和华借摩西吩咐他们的一切工作。
